title: ruta linifolia var. pubescens
intro: Ruta linifolia var. pubescens, also known as the hairy rue, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Ruta linifolia var. pubescens can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk remedies to treat various health conditions.
